The Dentist

Meet Dr. Trev.

Dr. Trevor J. Thomas, DDS — an artist working in enamel and light, devoted to the people behind every smile.

01 — The Philosophy

Dentistry is my ministry.

For Dr. Trev, a smile is a gateway — to confidence, to better mental health, to a fuller life. Every case begins not with a tooth, but with a person and the story they carry.

Over ten years he has refined a practice where world-class craftsmanship meets genuine care. He studies the face before the teeth, designs every smile by hand, and treats each patient like he'd treat his own mother.

The result is work that looks effortless and feels like coming home to yourself — restorations so natural they seem not done, but inevitable.

Real people. Real problems. Real results.

Dr. TrevDr. Trevor Thomas, DDS

02 — The Credentials

Training, taste, and a steady hand.

Doctor of Dental Surgery

Advanced training in cosmetic and restorative dentistry, with a focus on the art of the natural smile.

Cosmetic & Implant Focus

Years dedicated to veneers, implants, and full-mouth rehabilitation — the most demanding work in dentistry.

Hands-On, Every Case

Every restoration is designed and finished by Dr. Thomas himself. Nothing is outsourced, nothing is templated.

Cities Coast to Coast

Caring for patients across Beverly Hills, New York, Atlanta, Houston, Washington D.C., Tampa, and Memphis — by appointment.

Let's design the smile that's always been yours.

Book Your Consultation

An atelier of cosmetic & implant dentistry by Dr. Trevor J. Thomas, DDS.
